CHIANTELLI. APPEARANCE: CHRIS ANDREAS, ESQ. OF BRAYTON-PURCELL, 415/898-1555 ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF(S). NO APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF WESTERN MACARTHUR. MATTER WAS SUBMITTED ON THE PAPERS. REQUEST FOR JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF ARTHUR L. BETTIS AND AGAINST DEFENDANT WESTERN MACARTHUR CO. IN THE SUM OF $266,600.00 AND JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF JANICE BETTIS AND AGAINST DEFENDANT WESTERN MACARTHUR CO. IN THE SUM OF $150,000.00 PLUS COSTS AND INTEREST AS PROVIDED BY LAW, IN AN AMOUNT TO BE DETERMINED LATER BY THE COURT. THE COURT SUA SPONTE TOOK MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE CHIANTELLI; CLERK: V.
